aquacroptools 0.1.0
  • Reference
  • Articles
    • Regional Crop Simulations Using aquacroptools

Reference

All functions

aquacrop_version()

Get Aquacrop version string

build_crop_parameters() crop_params()

Build a Crop Parameter Set

calculate_crop_stages()

Get Crop Stages Lengths and Calendar

calculate_harvest_index_timing()

Calculate Harvest Index Building Parameters

calculate_plant_density() plant_density()

Calculate Plant Population Density

CropData

AquaCrop Crop Parameters

day_number() DayNumber()

Compute AquaCrop day-number from a given date

ece_to_salinity()

Get Salinity Description from ECe Value

get_aquacrop_path()

Get AquaCrop Executable Path

get_aquacrop_version()

Get AquaCrop Version

has_aquacrop()

Check if AquaCrop Executable is Available

init_aquacrop()

Initialize AquaCrop Project Structure

install_binaries()

Install AquaCrop Binary

is_leap_year()

Check if a Year is a Leap Year

is_plu()

Check if a File is an AquaCrop PLU File

ManData

AquaCrop Management Parameters

path_to_file()

Get access to CO2 Files Bundled in aquacroptools

read_cli() read_climate()

Read an AquaCrop CLI File

read_eto() read_et0()

Read an AquaCrop ETo File

read_plu()

Read an AquaCrop PLU File

read_season_out()

Read AquaCrop Season Output Files

read_tnx()

Read an AquaCrop Tnx File

round_to()

Round to Nearest Multiple

run_aquacrop()

Run AquaCrop simulation

salinity_to_ece()

Convert Salinity Level to ECe Value

SoilWater

Soil Water Characteristics Based on Soil Texture

st_grid()

Create Grid from Points

SWOData

Soil Initial Water Content Default Values

to_aquacrop_day()

Convert Dates to AquaCrop Day Numbers

weather

Example Weather Data for AquaCrop

write_cli()

Write AquaCrop Climate File

write_climate()

Write Complete AquaCrop Climate Dataset

write_cro()

Write AquaCrop Crop File

write_eto() write_et0()

Write AquaCrop Reference Evapotranspiration File

write_fwf()

Write Fixed-Width Format File

write_man()

Write AquaCrop Management File

write_man_batch()

Write AquaCrop MAN files in batch

write_plu()

Write AquaCrop Rainfall File

write_prm()

Write AquaCrop Parameter Files for Multiple Years (Batch)

write_prm_batch()

Write AquaCrop PRM files in batch

write_sol() write_soil()

Write AquaCrop Soil Profile File (.SOL)

write_swo() write_sw0()

Write AquaCrop Soil Initial Water Content File

write_tnx()

Write AquaCrop Temperature File
